touches.ai_summary: Initial LinkedIn outreach to Oliver Stern introducing AskElephant's call recording and coaching capabilities. Mentioned pain points around sales team visibility and coaching at scale. Oliver responded positively, expressing interest in learning more.
next_steps: Oliver agreed to receive follow-up email with more details

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview, use case examples for sales teams, and proposed times for discovery call. Oliver replied confirming interest and suggesting time slots.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce and our existing tech stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and API connections for most common sales tools

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Oliver Stern covering current sales process at EchoGrid. Oliver shared challenges with coaching his 7-person sales team, lack of visibility into calls, and inconsistent messaging. Currently using basic call recording but no analytics. Mentioned they're also evaluating Clari.

questions_asked.question: How does your AI coaching differ from Clari's approach?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI focuses on real-time coaching prompts and automated feedback loops, while Clari emphasizes forecasting and pipeline management

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in evaluating tools like this at EchoGrid?
questions_asked.answer: Right now it's mainly me driving this. I own the sales enablement budget.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are live within 2 weeks, with full team adoption in 30 days

next_steps: Oliver will loop in sales team for feedback

touches.ai_summary: Brief follow-up call to confirm demo agenda and attendees. Oliver confirmed he'll be the primary attendee and wants to focus on automation features and ROI metrics for his VP.

questions_asked.question: Will your VP of Sales be joining the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Not this one - I'll present findings to her afterward if it looks promising

next_steps: Demo scheduled for end of week

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with demo confirmation, agenda focusing on unlimited automation tier, and ROI calculator. Oliver confirmed attendance and asked for competitive comparison doc.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over a feature comparison with Clari before the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, sending over our positioning doc that covers key differentiators

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Oliver covering call recording, AI-powered coaching, automation workflows, and analytics dashboard. Oliver engaged positively, particularly interested in automated coaching scorecards and rep performance trends. Asked detailed questions about Salesforce sync and team rollout. No other EchoGrid stakeholders joined.

questions_asked.question: How granular can we get with custom coaching rubrics for our industry?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable - you can build rubrics by product line, deal size, or sales motion

questions_asked.question: What does the unlimited automation tier actually include vs lower tiers?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automated workflows, custom triggers, and advanced AI model access - no limits on volume

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what you're seeing with Clari's offering?
questions_asked.answer: Clari feels heavier on forecasting which our VP wants, but your coaching layer is stronger for my team's day-to-day

objections: Clari has more robust forecasting features that might matter to leadership
next_steps: Oliver to present internally to VP and sales team
Send proposal draft for 7 seats, unlimited automation

touches.ai_summary: Email with formal proposal sent: $6,800 ACV for 7 seats on unlimited automation plan. Included ROI analysis, implementation timeline, and customer references. Oliver acknowledged receipt and mentioned need to discuss with VP before moving forward.

Meeting positioned as 'exec alignment' but only Oliver attended - VP had conflict. Oliver shared generally positive internal feedback but expressed concern about budget approval process and timing. Discussed implementation plan and success metrics. Oliver mentioned VP still comparing with Clari's forecasting capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What flexibility do you have on pricing if we commit before end of quarter?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore some discount options for fast-track deals, typically 10-15% for quarterly closes

questions_asked.question: What's your VP's main hesitation at this point?
questions_asked.answer: She's not hesitating exactly, just wants to make sure we're picking the right tool. Clari has stronger pipeline features but higher price point

questions_asked.question: When can we get time with her directly to address questions?
questions_asked.answer: She's slammed this month - I'm the point person for now and will bring her in if we get closer on terms

objections: Budget approval process requires VP sign-off, timeline uncertain
next_steps: Oliver to get VP's final questions
Aim for decision by end of month

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Oliver. Discussed discount options, payment terms, and contract length. Oliver pushing for 20% discount citing Clari's competitive offer and budget constraints. Agreed to explore 12% discount for annual prepay. Oliver reiterated VP hasn't been directly involved yet but is 'supportive in principle.'

questions_asked.question: Can you match Clari's price if we move forward this week?
questions_asked.answer: We can't match exactly but can offer 12% off for annual commitment, bringing ACV to $5,984

questions_asked.question: Is your VP aware of the specific pricing and terms we're discussing?
questions_asked.answer: I've briefed her on the range - she trusts my judgment on vendor selection for the sales team

objections: VP hasn't reviewed final terms directly
next_steps: Oliver to get final approval from VP
